title: sclerolaena muricata var. lanata
intro: Sclerolaena muricata var. lanata, also known as the Woolly Sclerolaena or Woolly Sclerolaena Bush, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain alkaloids and flavonoids with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Sclerolaena muricata var. lanata may include teas, infusions, or extracts, although its use and preparation are not widely documented or standardized.
